violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. PIC removed the beverage and informed staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
Water was not available at the handwashing sink at the bar. PIC noted water service was turned off and turned water on during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Several foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC had staff date foods. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken, pork, and eggs were observed cooling on the counter. All foods were brought to the walk-in. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Bag of celery was observed in contact with water from an unknown source in the prep unit. PIC disposed. Bowls were observed in direct contact with the food below. Bowls removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/08/2025

The refuse area has an accumulation of construction materials. Refuse areas must be maintained clean and free of debris to prevent harborage conditions. PIC stated contractor is scheduled to return and remove materials. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2025
Soap, paper towels, and hand washing signage were observed at the prep sink and mop sink. Hand washing aids shall only be placed at hand washing sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC turned off machine to clean and sanitize. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Excess garbage and unused/broken equipment was observed on the ground in the trash area. PIC stated dumpster has been ordered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2025
Ice accumulation was observed on condensate line of the walk-in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2025
